digitraffic 0.0.0.9006

Fetch and cache detailed metadata for all LAM/TMS stations

Source: R/dt_stations_detailed.R
dt_stations_load_details.Rd

Downloads extended metadata (municipality, province, road number, …) for every station using parallel HTTP requests and saves the result to the user cache directory (tools::R_user_dir("digitraffic", "cache")).

Usage

dt_stations_load_details(max_active = 10L)

Arguments

max_active

Integer. Maximum number of concurrent HTTP requests. Default is 10. Increase for faster fetching on a fast connection; decrease to be more polite to the API.

Value

Invisibly returns the detailed stations tibble.

Details

After running this function the new filters in dt_stations() — road_number, municipality, province, and bbox — will use the refreshed data. You only need to re-run this when the package warns that the cache is out of date (i.e., new stations have been added to the network).

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
dt_stations_load_details()
} # }
